corrections.description: The article file contains completely wrong content - it shows meatless casserole recipes by Edythe K. Watson instead of a poem by Grayce E. Cutler. The page images show recipe content, not poetry.
corrections.text: The article file metadata indicates this should be a poem by Grayce E. Cutler on page 523, but the page images show meatless casserole recipes by Edythe K. Watson on pages 512-513. There appears to be a mismatch between the expected content and actual page content.
